abstract: Architecture and implementation patterns for building AI agents that integrate with CopilotKit via the AG-UI protocol. Contains 23 rules covering agent design with BuiltInAgent (@copilotkitnext/agent), useAgent hook, hook migration (useFrontendTool, useHumanInTheLoop, useRenderToolCall), multi-framework AG-UI adapters (Pydantic AI, LlamaIndex, MS Agent Framework), event streaming, state synchronization, human-in-the-loop checkpoints, and generative UI emission.
